attacking_style: Relies primarily on breakaway placements with team support rather than late-race attacks. Gains time through opportunistic group moves on mountainous stages, not explosive solo accelerations.
team_tactics: Groupama-FDJ embeds him in breakaways with multiple domestiques for positioning control. Team executes defensive protocols when in leader's jersey. Conserves energy by riding teammates' wheels strategically.
terrain_preference: Performs on moderate climbs and sustained efforts. Severely exposed on short, steep percentage walls and in crosswind scenarios where peloton fragments.
vulnerability: Cracks on steep gradient walls (lost 1m08s on one climb). Caught out when peloton splits in crosswinds. Struggles to recover and fades after major efforts (post-stage win fatigue).
key_patterns: Team-supported breakaway placement is primary tactic for GC gains, not late attacks (3 instances)
Vulnerable on steep percentage climbs, losing significant time on gradient walls (2 documented losses)
Exposed in crosswinds and peloton splits, lacking positioning skills in echelons (2 instances)
Strategically conserves energy by following teammates' wheels before taking leadership opportunities
Shows respectable ITT ability for young climber, handled GC pressure with maturity
Fades after major efforts suggesting recovery limitations at Grand Tour intensity
form_trajectory: negative: Early breakthrough to GC lead unsustainable, lost jersey and 1m+ on steep climbs, caught in crosswinds, faded post-effort on Tourmalet
